debug_info.goal:
S : LightProfinite
inst✝ : Nonempty ↑S.toTop
⊢ Injective (lightToProfinite.obj S)

failed_attempts:
by
  apply Injective.of_factors
  intro X Y g f hf
  haveI : Nonempty S := inferInstance
  obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := injective_of_light.factors g f hf
  exact ⟨lightToProfinite.map k, by simpa using hk⟩

by
  apply Injective.of_factors
  intro X Y g f hf
  obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := injective_of_light S hf (g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj 0)) f
    (by simp)
  use k
  simp [hk]

by
  apply Injective.of_factors
  intro X Y g f hf
  let f' := CompHausLike.isTerminalPUnit.from (lightToProfinite.obj S)
  let g' := CompHausLike.isTerminalPUnit.from Y
  have h_comm : f ≫ g' = g ≫ f' := by
    apply CompHausLike.isTerminalPUnit.hom_ext
  obtain ⟨k, hk1, hk2⟩ := Profinite.profinite_key_extension_lemma _ _ _ _ f f' g g' h_comm
  exact ⟨k, hk2⟩
